name: Sweet & Sour Chicken Crock Pot
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Dark brown sugar - firmly packed
1 tsp Dried cilantro or 10 fresh leaves
recipeInstructions:
For crockpot cooking:
1. Place vegetables at the bottom of the crockpot.
2. Sprinkle tapioca over the vegetables.
3. Place chicken atop the vegetables.
4. In a small bowl, combine all other ingredients except rice.
5. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
6. Cover the crockpot and cook on low for 8-10 hours.
7. Before serving, prepare the rice.
8. Serve over rice. Leftovers can be reheated in the microwave.
For oven cooking:
1. Place vegetables at the bottom of a greased pan.
2. Sprinkle vegetables with tapioca.
3. Add chicken to the pan.
4. In a small bowl, combine all other ingredients except rice.
5. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
6. Cover the pan tightly with foil.
7. Bake in a 300°F (150°C) oven for 2 hours.
8. Before serving, prepare the rice.
9. Serve over rice. Leftovers can be reheated in the microwave.
You can also use 2 Tbsp chopped candied ginger.
